pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py logical checks
task.json description and verifier.py logical checks

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates in a fully synthetic environment using the KStars/INDI CCD Simulator. The expected parameters exactly match the task definition and export/verifier scripts: 5 bias frames in /home/ga/Calibration/Bias, 5 flat frames in /home/ga/Calibration/Flats, a script at /home/ga/analyze_sensor.py, and a report at /home/ga/Documents/sensor_report.txt. To verify mathematical correctness, export_result.sh dynamically generates a hidden synthetic FITS file with a baseline signal of 35000 and 0.65x vignetting uniformly applied to the four 50x50 corners, confirming the accuracy of the agent's implemented algorithm.
